included.title: Included by default
included.description: Assembly kit with sealing is a standard option and is automatically added to the total price.
included.name: Assembly kit with sealing

dimensions.title: Dimensions of the WindowsProtector
dimensions.description1: Please note the maximum size of the wall opening for the WindowsProtector is 1800 × 1800 mm.
dimensions.invalidRange: Please enter a valid width and height between 400 mm and 1800 mm.
dimensions.notManufacturable: This size is not available for manufacture for the selected configuration.

installation.title: Installation method
installation.description: The acrylic partition for easy retrofitting is the perfect solution for sealing basement and building windows. Installation can be carried out either on the window frame or directly onto the building wall. In both cases, the acrylic partition is adhered and sealed using a special acrylic adhesive.

removable.title: Removable hatch
removable.description: Select predefined width and height. The hatch price will be mapped automatically.

tiltUp.title: Tilt-up hatch
tiltUp.description: Select predefined width and height. The hatch price will be mapped automatically.
